questions.question: 1 (a) The metre rule is fixed in position close to the spring. Do not change the position of the metre rule. (i) Use the set-square provided to take readings from the metre rule in order to determine the length l 0 of the coiled part of the spring. Record of readings taken .......................................................................

parts.answer: triangle method used and seen on graph at least half of candidate’s line used

k correct to 2 or 3 significant figures 0625/52 October/November 2018 V T to at least 1 d.p. and < 4 V I T to at least 2 d.p. and < 1 A P T correct V X < V T and I X present P X present and units V, A and W V Y < V T and I present P Y present and P X + P Y = P T within 10%
statement matches results idea of within (or beyond) limits of experimental accuracy explained, e.g. close enough, very close, too far apart

lamps and voltmeter in parallel correct symbols for lamps, ammeter and voltmeter in correct circuit 0625/52 October/November 2018 normal through block normal at centre of AB P and P at minimum distance apart of 5.0 cm a correct to ± mm b correct to ± mm and both with correct unit n correct, 2 or 3 significant figures with no unit n = 1.4 to 1.6 second set of lines seen on trace in approximately the correct positions and a and b recorded n within 10% of value in (b) two from: lining up the pins exactly / seeing pins clearly drawing accurate, thin lines getting pins vertical / bent pins placing block accurately on drawn outline / the outline is larger than the block 0625/52 October/November 2018 method: MP1 measure room / starting temperature MP2 measure the time to raise water temperature to boiling point MP3 repeat with the other two containers control variables: MP4 any two from: same starting temperature / same room temperature same volume / mass / amount of water MP5 keep Bunsen burner flame constant / same distance from flame to bottom of beaker table: MP6 table to show container and heating time conclusion: MP7 comparison of heating times and suitable comment made
